Article.ArticleTitle: Assessing antimicrobial resistance inclusion in pre-service pharmacy training curricula of five selected sub-Saharan African universities: challenges and opportunities.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Nigeria Centre for Disease Control, Abuja, Nigeria.
Slum and Rural Health Initiative, Ibadan, Nigeria.
Alliance Against Antimicrobial Resistance, Lagos, Nigeria.
Kwame Nkrumah University of Science and Technology, Kumasi, Ghana.
Institute of health policy and management evaluation, Toronto, Canada.
Ajisefini Consulting, Abuja, Federal Capital Territory, Nigeria.
Ajisefini Consulting, Abuja, Federal Capital Territory, Nigeria. ayodele@ajisefini.org.
Ducit Blue Foundation, Abuja, Nigeria. estelle.mbadiwe@ducitblue.com.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: Not Applicable under national regulations as no personal information/identifiable human data was collected or used in this study. Consent for publication: Informed consent was secured from all participants, which meets national requirements. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
